_comment: Synthetic tx that ran out of compute budget. meta.err is { InstructionError: [0, 'ComputationalBudgetExceeded'] } — a named runtime string error (tier-1 in resolveError). The consumed line shows consumed === limit, so isOverBudget=true. resolveError should resolve the name from SYSTEM_ERRORS.

logMessages: Program HeavyProg1111111111111111111111111111111111111 failed: exceeded maximum number of instructions allowed (200000) at instruction #59812
